channel.title: programming notes on Sukai Huang
channel.description: Recent content in programming notes on Sukai Huang

item.title: Python Module and Package Management 2023
item.description: [TOC] Title: Python Module and Package Management 2023 url: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=v6tALyc4C10 Python module common issue 1: python -m dir vs python dir python dir will use the dir as the PYTHONPATH as run __main.py file. however, python -m dir will not use the dir as PYTHONPATH but rather it will search the local library. thus ModuleNotFoundError may appear
